notes: Imported from tmpc34o6fhc.csv, merged with dataset_v1.json

cases.input: I was charged twice for my subscription this month. Can I get a refund?
cases.expected_summary: Customer requests a refund for a duplicate subscription charge.

cases.input: My invoice shows an extra $30 I don't recognize.
cases.expected_summary: Customer questions an unexpected charge on the invoice.

cases.input: Can you send me the receipt for my April payment?
cases.expected_summary: Customer requests a payment receipt.

cases.input: I canceled last week but I was still billed today.
cases.expected_summary: Customer reports being charged after cancellation.

cases.input: Why has my monthly plan become more expensive?
cases.expected_summary: Customer asks about an increase in subscription cost.

cases.input: My coupon SAVE20 isn't applying during checkout.
cases.expected_summary: Customer reports a discount coupon not working.

cases.input: Can I switch from monthly to yearly billing?
cases.expected_summary: Customer wants to change the billing cycle.

cases.input: Please refund my annual subscription.
cases.expected_summary: Customer requests a refund for the annual subscription.

cases.input: The API keeps returning a 500 Internal Server Error.
cases.expected_summary: Customer reports repeated HTTP 500 server errors.

cases.input: My webhook events stopped arriving yesterday.
cases.expected_summary: Customer reports webhook delivery failure.

cases.input: The Python SDK crashes after updating.
cases.expected_summary: Customer reports SDK crashes after an update.

cases.input: Every request times out after exactly 30 seconds.
cases.expected_summary: Customer experiences request timeout issues.

cases.input: OAuth login redirects back to the login page forever.
cases.expected_summary: Customer reports an OAuth authentication loop.

cases.input: The CLI says permission denied even though I'm admin.
cases.expected_summary: Customer reports CLI permission issues.

cases.input: Streaming responses stop halfway through.
cases.expected_summary: Customer reports incomplete streaming responses.

cases.input: The API works locally but fails in production.
cases.expected_summary: Customer reports environment-specific API failures.

cases.input: I lost access to my MFA device and can't log in.
cases.expected_summary: Customer requests assistance recovering account access after losing MFA.

cases.input: Please delete my account permanently.
cases.expected_summary: Customer requests permanent account deletion.

cases.input: How do I change my registered email address?
cases.expected_summary: Customer wants to update the account email.

cases.input: My password reset email never arrives.
cases.expected_summary: Customer cannot receive password reset emails.

cases.input: Someone logged into my account from another country.
cases.expected_summary: Customer reports suspicious account activity.

cases.input: Can I transfer ownership of my workspace?
cases.expected_summary: Customer wants to transfer workspace ownership.

cases.input: My account was suspended without warning.
cases.expected_summary: Customer asks why the account was suspended.

cases.input: I accidentally enabled SSO and nobody can log in now.
cases.expected_summary: Customer reports organization login issues caused by SSO.

cases.input: Do you have an API for developers?
cases.expected_summary: Customer asks whether an API is available.

cases.input: Where can I find your pricing?
cases.expected_summary: Customer requests pricing information.

cases.input: Is there a student discount?
cases.expected_summary: Customer asks about student discounts.

cases.input: What countries do you support?
cases.expected_summary: Customer asks about regional availability.

cases.input: When will the mobile app launch?
cases.expected_summary: Customer asks about future product availability.

cases.input: Can I integrate this with Slack?
cases.expected_summary: Customer asks whether Slack integration is supported.

cases.input: Where is your documentation?
cases.expected_summary: Customer requests product documentation.

cases.input: Do you comply with GDPR?
cases.expected_summary: Customer asks about GDPR compliance.

cases.input: We're a 200-person company evaluating your product against competitors, can we get a call with sales?
cases.expected_summary: Prospective customer requests a sales call for enterprise evaluation.

cases.input: Do you have an affiliate or partner program?
cases.expected_summary: Customer asks about affiliate or partner program availability.

cases.input: Not sure who to ask, but is there a status page for outages?
cases.expected_summary: Customer asks whether a status page for outages exists.
cases.notes: Mentions outages but is asking about a resource, not reporting a bug

cases.input: I'd love to see dark mode added to the app at some point.
cases.expected_summary: Customer requests a dark mode feature.

cases.input: What's the difference between your Starter and Growth plans?
cases.expected_summary: Customer asks about differences between two pricing plans.
cases.notes: Mentions plans but is a pre-sales feature question, not a billing problem

cases.input: Are you hiring? I'd love to work on a product like this.
cases.expected_summary: Customer asks if the company is hiring.

cases.input: hey
cases.expected_summary: Customer sent a message with no discernible request.

cases.input: Following up on my last email, any update?
cases.expected_summary: Customer follows up on a previous, unspecified email.
cases.notes: No context on original request; genuinely ambiguous

cases.input: cant login. password reset link says expird. ALSO billed twice this week!!
cases.expected_summary: Customer cannot log in via an expired reset link and also reports a duplicate charge.
cases.notes: Two issues in one email (account + billing); primary blocking issue is login access

cases.input: wont load. keeps spining. tried refresh 10x
cases.expected_summary: Customer's app won't load and shows an infinite spinner despite refreshing.

cases.input: Oh great, ANOTHER charge I didn't approve. Love that for me.
cases.expected_summary: Customer sarcastically complains about another unapproved charge.
cases.notes: Sarcastic tone should not obscure the billing intent

cases.input: Wow, three password resets and I STILL can't get in. Impressive.
cases.expected_summary: Customer sarcastically reports repeated failed password resets blocking login.

cases.input: No me deja iniciar sesion, dice contraseña incorrecta aunque la acabo de cambiar.
cases.expected_summary: Customer (writing in Spanish) cannot log in despite recently changing their password.
cases.notes: Non-English input, mixed/foreign language edge case

cases.input: Je n'arrive pas à annuler mon abonnement, le bouton ne fonctionne pas.
cases.expected_summary: Customer (writing in French) cannot cancel their subscription because the button doesn't work.
cases.notes: French input; billing intent with a technical symptom

cases.input: billing page is broken, throws an error when I click 'update card', also is this the right place to ask about refunds?
cases.expected_summary: Customer hits an error updating their card and asks about the refund process.
cases.notes: Overlaps billing and technical; primary intent is a billing task

cases.input: idk who handles this but my account somehow has two emails linked and I only added one???
cases.expected_summary: Customer is confused why two email addresses are linked to their single account.

cases.input: URGENT!!! nothing works, everything is BROKEN, fix this NOW
cases.expected_summary: Customer reports the product is broken without specifying details, urgently.
cases.notes: No specifics, all caps urgency, must still classify as technical by default vagueness

cases.input: k
cases.expected_summary: Customer sent a one-character message with no content.

cases.input: I love the product but the invoice PDF has a typo in our company name, can you fix that on file?
cases.expected_summary: Customer requests a correction to their company name on invoice records.

cases.input: The export button is greyed out for CSV but works fine for PDF, is that intentional?
cases.expected_summary: Customer asks whether a disabled CSV export button is intentional.

cases.input: Please remove my card details entirely from your systems, I don't want you storing them.
cases.expected_summary: Customer requests removal of stored payment card details.

cases.input: Is there a way to see a login history for my account, I think someone else accessed it.
cases.expected_summary: Customer wants to review login history due to suspected unauthorized access.

cases.input: Quick question - what timezone does the scheduling feature use internally?
cases.expected_summary: Customer asks which timezone the scheduling feature uses.

cases.input: Getting 'insufficient permissions' error even though I'm the account owner.
cases.expected_summary: Customer, despite being account owner, gets a permissions error.
cases.notes: Could plausibly be filed as account; core symptom is a permissions bug

cases.input: Can you explain what the 'usage overage' line item on my bill means?
cases.expected_summary: Customer asks for an explanation of a usage overage charge on their bill.

cases.input: The onboarding checklist won't mark step 3 as complete no matter what I do.
cases.expected_summary: Customer's onboarding checklist fails to mark a step complete.

cases.input: Any chance you could do a demo for our whole team next week?
cases.expected_summary: Customer requests a product demo for their team.

cases.input: my son used my laptop and now the account language is in korean and i cant read anything to change it back
cases.expected_summary: Customer's account language was changed and they need help reverting the setting.
